note: Resource -> HarvestGround catch dispenser config for /seas/harvest. `ground` is filled by deploy/deploy-harvestground.js once the HarvestGround is on-chain. supplyPool = the LP whose RESOURCE reserve = the standing flow-supply (water-keeper produced). skillVault = the WaterV2 vault whose treeWater -> skill level.
